name: Unnamed Project

entity_types.name: MartialArtist
entity_types.description: High-level combatants in the martial world capable of using qi or special techniques.

attributes.name: skill_level
attributes.description: The mastery level of their martial arts

attributes.name: technique_style
attributes.description: The specific style or signature move used

entity_types.name: Master
entity_types.description: Respected elders or teachers who guide disciples and influence martial world politics.

attributes.name: reputation
attributes.description: The historical standing in the martial world

entity_types.name: SectLeader
entity_types.description: Individuals holding official leadership positions within religious or martial factions.

entity_types.name: FactionMember
entity_types.description: Followers or subordinates belonging to a specific martial school or organization.

attributes.name: loyalty_degree
attributes.description: Level of devotion to their master

entity_types.name: Artifact
entity_types.description: Legendary weapons or magical objects that drive plot developments.

attributes.name: power_grade
attributes.description: The destructive potential of the item

entity_types.name: Location
entity_types.description: Geographic landmarks or strategic bases for martial factions.

entity_types.name: Technique
entity_types.description: Specific martial arts moves or spiritual manifestations.

attributes.name: elemental_type
attributes.description: The nature of the energy used

entity_types.name: Event
entity_types.description: Significant historical or martial gatherings that trigger opinion shifts.

attributes.name: impact_scale
attributes.description: How much it affects the martial world

entity_types.name: Person
entity_types.description: Any individual not fitting other specific warrior or leader types.

attributes.name: role
attributes.description: Their social function in the narrative

entity_types.name: Organization
entity_types.description: Groups, sects, or alliances that act as collective entities.

attributes.name: ideology
attributes.description: The core belief system of the group

edge_types.name: LEAD_FACTION
edge_types.description: A SectLeader or Master directs an Organization.

edge_types.name: BELONGS_TO
edge_types.description: A FactionMember is a part of an Organization.

edge_types.name: EXECUTE_TECHNIQUE
edge_types.description: A MartialArtist uses a specific Technique.

edge_types.name: CHALLENGE_AT
edge_types.description: An individual initiates a fight or event at a Location.

edge_types.name: ALLIED_WITH
edge_types.description: Two entities share a common goal or bond.

edge_types.name: REFORM_ORGANIZATION
edge_types.description: An Event changes the structure of an Organization.

edge_types.name: DEFEND_LOCATION
edge_types.description: A MartialArtist or FactionMember protects a Location.

edge_types.name: OPPOSE_POLICY
edge_types.description: An individual expresses dissent against an Organization's actions.

analysis_summary: The ontology is designed to capture the complex web of power struggles, religious alliances (Three Religions), and interpersonal rivalries in the 'Pili' universe. It focuses on how individual martial prowess (Techniques/Artifacts) influences large-scale political shifts (Organization reforms/Events).
